Formatting %d followed by words ("tokens"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string

Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.

issue.errorLine1: <string name="setting_asr_configure_vad_desc">伺服器 VAD 靈敏度，通常為 0.3 - 0.8</string>
<string name="setting_asr_configure_vad_desc">服务器 VAD 灵敏度，通常为 0.3 - 0.8</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_pitch_description">控制語音音調高低 (0.1 - 2.0，1.0為正常音調)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_pitch_description">音声のピッチを制御 (0.1 - 2.0、1.0が標準)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_speech_rate_description">控制語音播放速度 (0.1 - 3.0，1.0為正常速度)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_pitch_description">控制语音音调高低 (0.1 - 2.0，1.0为正常音调)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_speech_rate_description">音声の再生速度を制御 (0.1 - 3.0、1.0が標準)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_speech_rate_description">控制语音播放速度 (0.1 - 3.0，1.0为正常速度)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_pitch_description">Control the pitch of speech (0.1 - 2.0, 1.0 is normal)</string>
<string name="setting_tts_page_speech_rate_description">Control the speed of speech (0.1 - 3.0, 1.0 is normal)</string>
<string name="imggen_page_prompt_placeholder">生成したい画像を説明してください...</string>
<string name="imggen_page_prompt_placeholder">Describe the image you want to generate...</string>
<string name="translator_page_input_placeholder">翻訳するテキストを入力してください...</string>
<string name="workspace_terminal_loading">ワークスペースを読み込み中...</string>

Custom view ``TerminalView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
Custom view ``TerminalView`` has `setOnTouchListener` called on it but does not override `performClick`
`onTouch` lambda should call `View#performClick` when a click is detected
Use "`Gravity.START`" instead of "`Gravity.LEFT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Use "`Gravity.START`" instead of "`Gravity.LEFT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Use "`Gravity.END`" instead of "`Gravity.RIGHT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
Use "`Gravity.END`" instead of "`Gravity.RIGHT`" to ensure correct behavior in right-to-left locales
